text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm out shopping on my day off, when...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Eeek!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober comes bursting out from a very
crowded store.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I failed again. I was so close to getting that fragrance oil too...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Wh-what's it to you?
choice_data_list: Were you trying to buy something?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Ah, um, I...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Why do you care? It's nothing important anyway,
so I'm going to call it a day and go back.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
What's with you? In case you didn't hear me the
first time, I'm done here.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: It looks like I won't be able to buy her a present after all... Sigh...
choice_data_list: Steel yourself and plow on through!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Truth is, one of my relatives has been really burnt
out lately. I thought getting her some fragrance
oil would be a good pick-me-up.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
But the store is packed today because there's a
sale going on. I can't make any headway at all.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I need to head back soon, though... What should I
do...
choice_data_list: Steel yourself and plow on through!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
What are you on about? "Get something else?"
Who asked you?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Get something else... I never thought to do
that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Ah... Come to think of it, she really loves Mont
Blanc.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. It's not as if I'm taking your advice. I just
happened to remember that about her...
Goodbye.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
What would cheer her up... She seemed to love
the Mont Blanc I made for her last time.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
That might just work! It's important to try and
change perspective at times like these.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for the tip. I think I'll try to get the
fragrance oil another time.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
What are you trying to say? That I'm not taking
this seriously enough?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Plow on through? I wonder if that'll work. I could
barely take a step as it was.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...Hmph, but I really don't want to give up. I want
to do something to make my relative feel better.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to try again, and this time, I'll stand my
ground! Thanks for the encouragement.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'm not going to let that snide comment slide... I'll
bulldoze right through them, just you watch!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, she heads straight back into the
crowded store.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober emerges triumphantly with the
fragrance oil in hand. I hear her murmur, "I hope
McQueen likes this," before hurrying away.
